task_completion.description: Navigate to the New Appointment form in HospitalRun
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun web interface is visible, displaying a 'New Appointment' or scheduling form.

task_completion.description: Select the correct patient for the appointment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Patient input field in the appointment form is filled with 'Margaret Chen' or 'P00001'.

task_completion.description: Input the correct start and end dates and times
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date field shows '02/20/2026' with time '10:00 AM', and the End Date field shows '02/20/2026' with time '10:30 AM'.

task_completion.description: Input the appointment type, location, and reason
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Appointment Type dropdown/field is set to 'Outpatient', Location is set to 'Clinic A', and the Reason field contains 'Blood pressure follow-up consultation'.
A success notification (e.g., 'Appointment saved'), the form transitioning to a saved/read-only state, or the appointment appearing in the calendar/appointments list for Margaret Chen.

integrity.description: The agent must use the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and HospitalRun UI, not terminal commands or API scripts (like curl) making backend requests.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual HospitalRun application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine HospitalRun web application, not a text editor, notes app, or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent must enter data into the appropriate distinct fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not just paste the entire task description into a single text box (like the reason field); data must be distributed into the correct form fields (Patient, Date, Location, etc.).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Margaret Chen. Patient ID: patient_p1_000001 (or P00001). Appointment Type: Outpatient. Location: Clinic A. Reason: Blood pressure follow-up consultation. Start: 02/20/2026 10:00 AM. End: 02/20/2026 10:30 AM.
